title: Coregentis Cognitive Object Envelope
description: Base envelope for first-class Coregentis runtime objects. This schema defines the minimum cross-cutting structure required before any object-specific fields are added.

schema_version.description: Optional schema stream version carried by this object instance. Detailed schema-governance interpretation is defined outside the base envelope.

object_type.description: Canonical Coregentis object type in kebab-case.

authority_class.description: Authority class required by the Coregentis object registry and binding law.

primary_layer.description: Primary architectural layer affiliation for the object.

status.description: Object-local lifecycle or runtime status. Concrete object schemas may narrow this.

protocol_binding_ref.description: Optional protocol binding reference for protocol-native or runtime-bound objects. This does not define binding law by itself; it only preserves reconstructable linkage.

temporal.description: Temporal positioning and horizon semantics for the object.

lineage.description: Source and derivation lineage for the object.

governance.description: Governance references and control-state for the object.

coregentis_identifier.description: UUID v4 identifier aligned with imported MPLP identifier conventions.
